hierarchy.labels: text-xs sm:text-sm tracking-[0.1em] uppercase text-slate-400 font-semibold

layout_and_spacing.rtl_support: Use flex-row-reverse or dir='rtl' for Arabic language dynamically.

buttons.primary: bg-[#007A3D] text-white hover:bg-[#006C35] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,122,61,0.5)]

cards.match_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#121C3A] border border-white/10 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20
cards.prediction_slip: bg-[#1A2547] border border-dashed border-white/20 rounded-lg p-6 relative before:absolute before:-left-3 before:top-1/2 before:w-6 before:h-6 before:bg-[#0A1128] before:rounded-full after:absolute after:-right-3 after:top-1/2 after:w-6 after:h-6 after:bg-[#0A1128] after:rounded-full
cards.leaderboard_podium: bg-gradient-to-t from-[#1A2B6D] to-[#121C3A] border-t-2 border-[#F5C518] rounded-t-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-end shadow-[0_-5px_20px_rgba(245,197,24,0.15)]

inputs.text: bg-[#0A1128] border border-white/10 focus:border-[#2BB6C7] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2BB6C7] text-white rounded-md p-3
inputs.score_input: w-16 h-16 text-center text-3xl font-bold bg-[#0A1128] border border-white/10 focus:border-[#007A3D] text-white rounded-lg mx-2 appearance-none

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the background to reduce flat digital feel.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Hover states must lighten background and translate-y-1 on cards. CTAs must glow.
visual_enhancers.icons: lucide-react for UI icons. Custom SVG for flags/teams if needed.

image_urls.description: Aerial view of an illuminated sports stadium at night. Use as full-page background with heavy navy overlay.
NCC Company Logo. Display prominently in header.
Golden trophies. Use subtly in leaderboard or success screens.
Soccer balls on grass. Use for empty states or generic sports cards.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, forms, inputs, and major sections MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="login-submit-button"', 'data-testid="match-card-1"').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure complete RTL support using dir='rtl' on the HTML tag or wrapper when Arabic is selected.
Add tailwind configuration for custom colors ncc-navy, ncc-teal, saudi-green, and gold.
Build a robust layout using the provided Deep Navy and Teal colors, with Saudi Green for the main CTAs.
Match cards should have a 'ticket' feel with dashed borders or cutouts.
Leaderboard must highlight the top 3 visually (Podium effect) using Gold, Silver, Bronze accents.
Registration is password-less, just Employee Name and Employee ID. Store context appropriately.
Use 'Outfit' font for English, and 'Cairo' for Arabic text. Ensure these are imported from Google Fonts.
Avoid standard generic Shadcn card looks. Customize Shadcn borders and backgrounds to match the glassy dark theme.
Admin panel needs to be simple, using the Swiss/High-contrast archetype for clarity.
